evals.name: conflict-chatgpt-dalle
evals.expected_output: Resolves verification conflict for ChatGPT DALL-E Image Generation. Should research the GPT-4o vs DALL-E 3 transition, assess whether data needs updating, and close with appropriate comment.
expectations: Identifies correct resolution type (research needed OR no-change with reasoning about the GPT-4o/DALL-E 3 transition)
References the GPT-4o replacing DALL-E 3 as built-in image generation in its assessment
Close comment includes a source citation (URL or named source)
The gh issue close command is syntactically valid bash
Presents assessment to the user before making data changes (per skill rule)

evals.name: inconclusive-claude-memory
evals.expected_output: Resolves inconclusive verification for Claude Memory. Must NOT rely on its own knowledge (conflict of interest rule). Should use external sources to verify current state and close appropriately.
expectations: Uses external research (Perplexity API call or URL fetch) rather than relying on own knowledge about Claude
Explicitly acknowledges the conflict-of-interest rule for Claude/Anthropic data
Identifies correct resolution type (likely no-change close since Perplexity couldn't confirm changes)
The gh issue close command is syntactically valid bash
Bumps Checked date to today (2026-03-15) in proposed changes

evals.name: inconclusive-gemini-ai-studio
evals.expected_output: Resolves inconclusive verification for Gemini AI Studio. Should verify AI Studio is still GA and free, address the deprecated status claim, and close appropriately.
expectations: Identifies correct resolution type (no-change close — AI Studio is still GA and free)
Addresses the 'deprecated status' potential change mentioned in the issue
The gh issue close command is syntactically valid bash
Bumps Checked date to today (2026-03-15) in proposed changes
Does NOT change the status field to deprecated (would be incorrect)
